name: Release Notes v3.15.1 - API Updates
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have made one improvement to the EDS API, and one resolution to the Unified/Rest API."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This update will be made available to all customers between "},{"text":"7th February","bold":true},{"text":" - "},{"text":"15th February","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Improvements"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have added two new fields to the "},{"text":"EDS API","bold":true},{"text":" in preparation for a future "},{"type":"a","url":"https://portal.productboard.com/xjc5eqgr3wpp4lregjvharq3/c/38-shopify-preorders-feature","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Shopify Pre-Order"}]},{"text":" feature (you can read more about it on our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://portal.productboard.com/xjc5eqgr3wpp4lregjvharq3/c/38-shopify-preorders-feature","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Product Portal"}]},{"text":")."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These fields will not impact existing integrations. Further information on this feature will be available in the future."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"<PreOrdersEnabled>false</PreOrdersEnabled><StockForPreOrder xsi:nil=\"true\"/>"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Resolutions"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Updated the "},{"text":"Unified/Rest API","bold":true},{"text":" to ensure the totals are consistent with the Sales Report (please note that Freight and Vouchers are reported separately and not included in the Order Total)"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
